notes: Re-captured at WI-6.3e: the consolidate checklist journal rides the unified fs-txn engine (kind `consolidate`, root = stash; backups under the transaction dir). Write-time shape observed via spyOn(fs.writeFileSync/copyFileSync) interception of the engine's durable journal.json.tmp writes around a REAL akmConsolidate run.
Only the write COUNT and each write's parsed phase/checklist shape are recorded as informational data (brief §3.2 rule 4) -- never raw journal bytes or directory layout.
fullRunLifecycle.firstJournalWrite/lastJournalWrite.operations[].ref embeds a fixture-local ref (tests/fixtures/goldens/consolidate/fixture-refs.ts) -- re-baseline @ 5 caveat on that field only.
scenario: consolidate journal round-trip: full-run lifecycle + all-hot chunk early-exit (WI-06, R5)
